title: vilfa robusta
intro: Vilfa robusta, also known as rough fescue or robust fescue grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This perennial grass is native to Europe and Asia and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Vilfa robusta include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Vilfa robusta is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and infusions in the form of teas, tinctures, and dried plant material for medicinal purposes.
